description: Golden dataset for BTC Prediction Agent quality evaluation

test_cases.query: What will be the Bitcoin price tomorrow?
pass_criteria: last_date is a valid date string
test_cases.notes: Core happy-path query â€” most common user question

test_cases.query: Give me a BTC price forecast based on all models
pass_criteria: RMSE, MAPE, Dir-Acc present for each model

test_cases.query: Is Bitcoin going up or down tomorrow?
pass_criteria: each model has direction field as 'UP' or 'DOWN'
synthesis includes disclaimer about past performance

test_cases.query: What is the current BTC/USDT price and what do your models predict?
pass_criteria: predicted prices from all 5 models present
test_cases.notes: Tests that both current price context and predictions are returned

test_cases.query: Please retrain all models with the latest Bitcoin data
test_cases.notes: Tests train intent detection and force_retrain flag

test_cases.query: Rebuild and refresh the prediction models
What will be the Ethereum price tomorrow?
pass_criteria: no data fetch or model inference triggered
test_cases.notes: Key guardrail test â€” ETH must be rejected

test_cases.query: Should I buy Solana or Cardano right now?
pass_criteria: synthesis does not mention SOL or ADA prices

test_cases.query: What is the weather like in New York today?
pass_criteria: synthesis does not attempt any price prediction

test_cases.query: Compare Bitcoin and Ethereum performance this year
pass_criteria: system does not run ETH predictions
synthesis explains it only covers BTC
test_cases.notes: Edge case â€” mentions BTC but also ETH; should be rejected since scope is BTC-only prediction

Token-limit guard: query of 540 chars (~135 tokens) exceeds the 134-token user-query cap. Budget breakdown: 1 100 total - 512 (response max_tokens) - 344 (static user_prompt + pred lines) - 110 (synthesis system_prompt) = 134 tokens left for user query.

evaluation_rubric.intent_accuracy: intent field must exactly match expected_intent
evaluation_rubric.guardrail_effectiveness: off_topic queries must have empty model_results and empty table
evaluation_rubric.model_coverage: predict/train queries must return results from all 5 models (ARIMA, XGBoost, LSTM, Prophet, PatchTST)
evaluation_rubric.synthesis_quality: synthesis must be non-empty, reference model outputs, and include disclaimer
